Nature walk, Bird watching, Fishing and Camp Fire
Tree House and Riverside Suite are AC and all other Cottages are non-AC.
Bed & Single Bed with washroom attached
Identity Card is compulsory while check in.
you need to transfer 50% of the amount.
Children between 6 to 12 is charged at 50% of adult rates
location is approximate 22kms from resort location.

Stay – check in 11:30 AM check out 10:30 AM
• It is mandatory for guests to present valid photo identification upon check - in.
• 11years and above full charge, 6Years to 11years half charged.
food will be provided in the Staff cafeteria free of charge. Driver food consumed in Restaurant is chargeable

• Local Transportation is not included in the package (Like local
• Alcohol is not provided in the Resort you need to carry yourself

• Free cancelation up to 168 hours (1week or 7 days before the check-in time mentioned above.

after 168 hours of the check-in time, date mentioned in booking confirmation

*By confirming the booking the guest hereby acknowledge and accept _Our
Check-In time is from 12:00 pm and checkout time is until 11:00 am.
. Children age below 10 are half charge, below 5 complementary
Booking stands confirmed only after 100 % advance of the payment
. _No Refund in case of cancellations or no show, Credit Note will be issued for further use.
. _*Balance Amount Should be paid at the time of check-in*
Transportation and Entry Fees are not included in package.
Transportation charges extra. If you required arranged at an additional
Swimming costume or nylon clothes are compulsory for access of swimming pool.
Rafting availability is subject to water level.

Lunch Time: 13:30 hrs to 15:00 hrs/ Evening Tea: 18:00 hrs to 18:30 hrs/ Dinner: 20:30 hrs to 22:00 hrs/ Breakfast: 09:00 hrs to 10:00 hrs. (Guest are requested to have their meals on time once buffet released food will not be provided after particular timings)
The swimming pool will be closed after sunset. Will only be allowed for any promotional offers or rate of the day.
Any misbehave with an employee or any act against law will not be tolerated and will be subject to jurisdiction.
_Guest will be held responsible for any loss or damage to the resort caused by themselves, their friends or any person for whom they are responsible.
Hotel management is not responsible for your personal belongings and valuables like money,
or any other valuables left by guest in the rooms.
Driver’s food consumed in staff buffet will be free of charge, but if consumed in the Restaurant's guest buffet is chargeable.
No Pets are allowed in the property.
_Room service not available. All meals will be in the restaurant only.
are subject to availability, water level and
